canonical_definition: A benchmark for evaluating retrieval and reasoning capabilities when relevance depends on implicit facts in documents, covering arithmetic, temporal, and world knowledge reasoning across uni- and multi-speaker discourse styles.
papers: Breaking the Noise Barrier:LLM-Guided Semantic Filtering and Enhancement for Multi-Modal Entity Alignment
